overall.description: A cinematic static shot from a video game depicting a gothic-style classroom or great hall with students in dark robes seated at wooden desks. The scene features medieval stone architecture, arched windows with diffused natural light, and a somber academic atmosphere reminiscent of a magical school setting.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a gothic-style classroom or great hall from a video game. Students in dark academic robes sit at wooden desks arranged in rows, facing forward. The hall features tall arched windows, dark wood paneling, and stone architecture, with diffused morning light filtering through the windows creating a somber, scholarly atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a gothic-style classroom that preserves a somber and scholarly atmosphere. It begins with a wide view of the great hall, where students in dark academic robes sit poised at wooden desks arranged in disciplined rows. As the camera lingers, the focus settles on the interplay between the dark wood paneling and the heavy stone architecture of the room. The scene remains anchored in this stillness, with diffused morning light filtering through tall arched windows to cast a soft, muted glow over the academic setting.
